05 — Usage
✓ Do
Use the logo on white or dark (#1E1C1D) backgrounds only.

Maintain clear space equal to the height of the icon around the lockup.

Use SVG files for all digital and print applications.
✗ Don’t
Don’t place the logo on busy or coloured backgrounds without using the correct variant.

Don’t stretch, rotate, or alter the proportions of the logo.

Don’t recreate the wordmark in another typeface or weight.
Questions
For partnership and co-branding guidelines:

Organised by Talent Protocol & CTO Portugal.
